untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of trend line support/resistance levels which are not available as standard indicators. The pattern requires manual trend line drawing and detection of rebounds off lower trend lines, which cannot be expressed purely through the allowed technical indicators without explicit trend line price levels as parameters.
translation_notes: Approximated trend line rebounding behavior using price crossing above SMA_20 (representing uptrend direction) and close above previous low (representing rebound). Stop-loss set at 3% per the signal specification. Exit condition uses trend reversal below SMA_20 as proxy for price reaching and ricocheting from upper trend line. True implementation would require trend line equation parameters or manual trade entry signals.
